case_title: MARCUS HOPKINS VS. METRIC MOTORS OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY HOPKINS, MARCUS AS TO DEFENDANT METRIC MOTORS OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $90. SERVED MAR-14-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT METRIC MOTORS OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF MARCUS HOPKINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT METRIC MOTORS OF SAN FRANCISCO REPRESENTED BY JOSE ESTRELLA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) -JOSE ESTRELLA FILED BY DEFENDANT METRIC MOTORS OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOPKINS, MARCUS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT METRIC MOTORS OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
